description.en: Custom firmware mods for the UC Remote 3. Mod 1: configurable charging-screen screensaver with Matrix rain, Starfield, Minimal, Analog, and TV Static themes. Mod 3: compact battery indicator on every entity / activity detail page. Mod 4: WiFi UX bundle — live link diagnostics, always-visible signal indicator, reconnect button, WoWLAN toggle on UCR3.
